note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 2.1 cm x 2.0 cm x 1.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 36% slough, 64% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
